stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Knicks' fourth-quarter come...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned and what's next in this series.

stories.title: Knicks flip script, attack Harden to spark rally
stories.summary: The Knicks flipped the script on the Cavaliers in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference finals, as Jalen Brunson sparked a historic rally by relentless targeting James Harden.

stories.title: Atkinson OK keeping timeouts while Cavs collapsed
stories.summary: Cleveland Cavaliers coach Kenny Atkinson defended holding on to his timeouts down the stretch of the fourth quarter Tuesday, even as his team was blowing a 22-point lead to the New York Knicks in the final minutes of the Eastern Conference finals opener.

stories.title: Kidd out as Mavericks coach after five seasons
stories.summary: Jason Kidd is out as the head coach of the Dallas Mavericks after five seasons in what the team described as a mutual decision Tuesday evening.

stories.title: Chiefs' Rice violates probation, ordered to jail
stories.summary: Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice has been sentenced to immediately serve 30 days in jail after testing positive for marijuana in violation of the terms of his probation.
